extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed against the Company from matters filed by the Company and separately lists proceedings against Directors. I counted only against rows: criminal proceedings are 1 against Directors; statutory/regulatory actions are 2 against the Company plus 3 against Directors, totaling 5; indirect tax proceedings are 1 against the Company. The quantified amount against the Company and its subsidiaries is ₹0.01 million plus ₹5.38 million of indirect tax proceedings, totaling ₹5.39 million, converted to ₹0.539 crore; the ₹4.63 million criminal amount in the 'filed by our Company' row is excluded. No contingent-liabilities total, going-concern uncertainty, or company-wide top-customer concentration percentage is disclosed; the source litigation amounts use ₹ million, converted to crore at 1 crore = ₹10 million.
